description: CompositionPurple printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, has a pierrot collar, hakoba stitch detailing along the length, and split sides on the hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this purple kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh with the pierrot collar, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
